name: Matt Merker
title: Pastor & Hymn Writer
tagline: Modern congregational hymnwriter serving the local church with doctrinally rich songs
bio: Matt Merker is a pastor, worship leader, and hymn writer known for writing and co-writing modern congregational songs used in theologically conservative evangelical churches. He has served in local church ministry and has collaborated with Getty Music and other modern hymn writers committed to restoring robust congregational singing. His songs are written for church use rather than performance, with an emphasis on biblical clarity and singable melodies.
faith: Merker's work sits squarely within the modern hymn movement that aims to wed theological depth with accessible congregational music. His public ministry and writing reflect a commitment to Scripture-shaped worship, Christ-centered song, and the ordinary life of the local church. That combination makes him a strong fit for SDG as a contemporary hymn writer serving the church's worship rather than a merely commercial music career.

sources.title: Getty Music — Hymn Writing Team
sources.note: Lists Matt Merker among Getty Music's hymn writing team
